meaning: n.模范,式样,模式,样品,格调,图案vt.模仿,仿造,以图案装饰vi.形成图案
examples: All three attacks followed the same pattern.
The pattern is essentially the same in all cases.
Mornings in our house always follow a set pattern.
He has broken sharply with the fiscal pattern of earlier Labour governments in one respect, however.
DuPont noted though that crop protection product volumes fell slightly because of northern hemisphere sales pattern shifts.
